---
name: Add a game
about: Recommend a flash or html game
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

if you want it to be added on the website you must include:

**Game File(s)**
include a link either using catbox or google drive, MEGA, onedrive, or whatever you desire.

**Which engine is it from (FLASH OR HTML)**
Just give a simple answer.

**Game name**
You must include the games name.

**Which catagory**
You must include the name of the catagory the game it is.
game catagories are:
* Action
* Platformer
* Puzzle
* Arcade
* Racing
* Strategy
* or Other/Misc

**(OPTIONAL) Game Controls**
include which keyboard buttons actions does the game contain for certain moves or actions.
